name: All Vulnerabilities
jql: labels in (vuln) order by due asc

name: Customer Prod Regression
jql: issuetype = bug AND project in (Platform,UDP) AND status not in (Duplicate, "Will Not Fix", Invalid, "Can Not Reproduce", Canceled, "Not a Bug") AND ("Defect Type[Select List (multiple choices)]" = Regression ) AND "Found In[Dropdown]" in (prod, prod-0, smp, ONPREM) AND "Customer(s)" is not EMPTY AND "Customer(s)" not in ("Harness/ Internal", Harness) and resolution = Unresolved

name: CustomerCommitOverDue
jql:
project in (Platform, "Unified Data Platform")
and ((type in (Initiative, Epic)
and ( "Customer Commitment[Date]" IS NOT empty
or ("customer(s)[select list (multiple choices)]" IS NOT empty
and "customer(s)[select list (multiple choices)]" NOT IN (Harness, "Harness/ Internal"))))
and resolution = Unresolved)
and created <= 2026-01-31

name: Dashboard Beta Bugs
jql:
type = bug and labels = dashboard-2.0-bugs and resolution = Unresolved
ORDER BY assignee ASC, priority DESC, status ASC

name: Filter for Platform
jql: project in (10215) ORDER BY Rank ASC

name: Internal Prod Regression
jql: issuetype = bug AND project in (Platform,UDP)  AND status not in (Duplicate, "Will Not Fix", Invalid, "Can Not Reproduce", Canceled, "Not a Bug") AND ("Defect Type[Select List (multiple choices)]" = Regression ) AND "Found In[Dropdown]" in (prod, prod-0, smp, ONPREM) AND ("Customer(s)" is EMPTY OR "Customer(s)" in (Harness, "Harness/ Internal")) AND RESOLUTION = Unresolved

name: Internal Regression
jql: issuetype = bug AND project IN (Platform, UDP) AND ("Defect Type[Select List (multiple choices)]" = Regression ) AND "Found In[Dropdown]" not in (prod, prod-0, smp, ONPREM)

name: Open Feature Request
jql: issuetype = "Feature Request" and resolution = Unresolved

name: Others Depend on Platform
jql: project = PL  and issuetype = Depend and resolution = Unresolved

name: Others Depend on UDP
jql: project = UDP  and issuetype = Depend and resolution = Unresolved

name: PL Dependency on Other
jql: issuetype = Depend and parentProject = PL and resolution = unresolved

name: Platform 1Q2027 Commiment
jql: project in (PL, UDP) AND issuetype in (Initiative, Epic, Spike) AND "Delivery quarter[Dropdown]" = 1Q2027 AND STATUS NOT IN (DUPLICATE, Invalid, "Will Not Fix")

name: Platform 2Q2027 Commiment
jql: project in (PL, UDP) AND issuetype in (Initiative, Epic, Story, Spike) AND "Delivery quarter[Dropdown]" = 2Q2027 AND STATUS NOT IN (DUPLICATE, Invalid, "Will Not Fix")

name: Platform All OPEN Prod MissingSeverity
jql: project in (Pl, UDP) AND  issuetype = Bug AND "Found In[Dropdown]" in (PROD, PROD-0, ONPREM, SMP) AND status not in (Invalid, "Can Not Reproduce", "Not a Bug", "Will Not Fix", Duplicate) AND resolution = Unresolved and "Severity[Dropdown]" = EMPTY

name: Platform All Open CFDs
jql: project IN (PL, "Unified Data Platform") AND project = Platform AND issuetype = Bug AND "Found In[Dropdown]" in (PROD, PROD-0, ONPREM, SMP) AND status not in (Invalid, "Can Not Reproduce", "Not a Bug", "Will Not Fix", Duplicate) AND "Customer(s)" is not EMPTY AND "Customer(s)" not in ("Harness/ Internal", Harness) and resolution = Unresolved

name: Platform All Open RCA
jql: project in (PL, "Unified Data Platform") AND issuetype = rca AND status not in (done, invalid, cancelled)

name: Platform All Open Vulnerability Tickets
jql: Project in (PL,UDP) AND labels in (vuln) AND status not in (deployed, "will not fix", done, "not a bug", "duplicate", "cancelled", "invalid","Dev Complete") ORDER BY due ASC

name: Platform Backlog (Everything)
jql: project in (Platform, "Unified Data Platform") and resolution = Unresolved

name: Platform Backlog (Init,Epic)
jql: project in (PL) AND issuetype IN (Initiative, Epic) AND resolution = Unresolved

name: Platform Cloud Cost
jql: labels IN ( rnd-cloud-cost-warroom, finops-recommendation) and status in ("To Do") and project in (PL,UDP) ORDER BY createdDate

name: Platform Customer VulnTickets SLA Breached
jql: Project in (PL,UDP) and labels in (vuln) AND labels in (jira_escalated) AND status not in (deployed, Done, "will not fix", "not a bug", duplicate, Canceled, invalid, cancelled) AND (due <= now() OR due is EMPTY) ORDER BY key ASC, due ASC, status DESC

name: Platform Missing Severity
jql: project in (Platform, "Unified Data Platform") and issuetype = bug and severity is EMPTY and "Found In[Dropdown]" in ('PROD', 'PROD-0') and resolution = Unresolved

name: Platform Open Questions
jql: project in (Platform, "Unified Data Platform") AND type = Question AND statusCategory != Done ORDER BY created DESC

name: Platform Open RCA Action
jql:
labels in (rca_action_item)
AND project in (PL,UDP) AND statusCategory != Done

name: Platform Security Tickets (Customer Requiring Fix)
jql: Project in (PL, UDP) And labels in (vuln) AND labels in (jira_escalated) AND status NOT IN (deployed, "will not fix", done, "not a bug", "duplicate", "cancelled", "invalid", "Dev Complete") ORDER BY due ASC

name: Platform Security Tickets (End-of-life)
jql:
Project in (PL,UDP) AND status NOT IN (deployed, "will not fix", done, "not a bug", "duplicate", "cancelled", "invalid", "Dev Complete")
AND labels = eol_component
ORDER BY due ASC

name: Platform Spike
jql: Project in (PL,UDP) and issuetype = Spike and resolution = Unresolved

name: Platform VulnTickets - Fix not Available
jql: PRoject in (PL,UDP) AND labels = Fix-not-available AND status NOT IN (Done, "Done w/ FF", "Done w/ GA", "Done ✅")

name: Platform VulnTickets - SLA Breached
jql:
Project in (PL,UDP) AND labels IN (vuln)
AND status NOT IN (deployed, "will not fix", done, "not a bug", "duplicate", "cancelled", "invalid", "Dev Complete")
AND due <= "0"
ORDER BY due ASC

name: Platform VulnTickets - to Breach in 15Days
jql:
Project in (PL,UDP) AND labels IN (vuln)
AND status NOT IN (deployed, "will not fix", done, "not a bug", "duplicate", "cancelled", "invalid", "Dev Complete")
AND due >= "0"
AND due <= 15d
ORDER BY due ASC

name: Platform VulnTickets - to Breach in 7Days
jql:
Project in (PL,UDP) AND labels IN (vuln)
AND status NOT IN (deployed, "will not fix", done, "not a bug", "duplicate", "cancelled", "invalid", "Dev Complete")
AND due >= "0"
AND due <= 7d
ORDER BY due ASC

name: Platform-All - Bugs
jql:
project IN (PL) AND issuetype IN (Bug)
ORDER BY created DESC, priority DESC, updated DESC

name: Platform-All-CFDs-Trend
jql: project IN (PL, "Unified Data Platform") AND issuetype = Bug AND "Found In[Dropdown]" in (PROD, PROD-0, ONPREM, SMP) AND status not in (Invalid, "Can Not Reproduce", "Not a Bug", "Will Not Fix", Duplicate) AND "Customer(s)" is not EMPTY AND "Customer(s)" not in ("Harness/ Internal", Harness) AND created >= -180d

name: Platform-All-IFD-Trend
jql: project = Platform AND ("Customer(s)" is EMPTY AND Reporter != "Zendesk Support for Jira"  And "SWAT Initiated" = "No") AND type = Bug And created >= -180d

name: Platform-All-OPEN-Prod
jql: project in (Pl, UDP) AND  issuetype = Bug AND "Found In[Dropdown]" in (PROD, PROD-0, ONPREM, SMP) AND status not in (Invalid, "Can Not Reproduce", "Not a Bug", "Will Not Fix", Duplicate) AND resolution = Unresolved

name: Platform-All-OPEN-Prod_S0S1S2
jql:
project in (Pl, UDP) 
and issuetype = Bug AND "Found In[Dropdown]" in (PROD, PROD-0, ONPREM, SMP) AND status not in (Invalid, "Can Not Reproduce", "Not a Bug", "Will Not Fix", Duplicate) and resolution = Unresolved and "Severity[Dropdown]" in (S0,S1,S2)

name: Platform-All-Open-IFD
jql: project in (Platform, UDP) AND issuetype = Bug AND "Found In[Dropdown]" in (PROD, PROD-0, ONPREM, SMP) AND status not in (Invalid, "Can Not Reproduce", "Not a Bug", "Will Not Fix", Duplicate) AND ("Customer(s)" is EMPTY OR "Customer(s)" in (Harness, "Harness/ Internal")) AND resolution = Unresolved

name: Platform-All-REGRESSIONS
jql: project in (PL, "Unified Data Platform") AND issuetype = Bug AND (labels IN (regression) OR "Defect Type[Select List (multiple choices)]" = Regression) AND created >= -180d

name: Platform-BUGS-Fixed-Last-15D
jql: project = "Cloud Cost Management" and statusCategory = Done and issuetype in (Bug) and status not in (Invalid, "Not a Bug", "Will Not Fix", Duplicate, "Can Not Reproduce") and resolved > -10d order by resolved DESC

name: Platform-Block-Others-Open
jql: project in (Platform, "Unified Data Platform") AND (issuetype = Depend OR issueLinkType in ("is blocked by")) AND resolution = Unresolved

name: Platform-Bug-OVERDUE
jql: project in (Platform, UDP) and statusCategory not in (done) and duedate <now() and issuetype in (Bug) and "Severity[Dropdown]" in (S0, S1)

name: Platform-CustomerRegression-Last2Wks
jql: issuetype = bug AND project in (Platform,UDP) AND status not in (Duplicate, "Will Not Fix", Invalid, "Can Not Reproduce", Canceled, "Not a Bug") AND ("Defect Type[Select List (multiple choices)]" = Regression ) AND "Found In[Dropdown]" in (prod, prod-0, smp, ONPREM) AND "Customer(s)" is not EMPTY AND "Customer(s)" not in ("Harness/ Internal", Harness) and resolution = Unresolved and created >= -14d

name: Platform-FEATURES-DUE-THISMONTH
jql:
filter = "Platform PM/Eng Prioritized Tickets"
and resolution = Unresolved
and "Customer Commitment[Date]" IS NOT empty
ORDER BY component ASC, "cf[10738]" ASC

name: Platform-Last2Weeks-DONE
jql: project in (Platform, "Unified Data Platform") and statusCategory = Done and issuetype in (Bug, Epic) and status not in (Invalid, "Not a Bug", "Will Not Fix", Duplicate, "Can Not Reproduce") and resolved > -15d order by resolved DESC

name: Platform-Open-CFDs-BreachedSLA
jql: project IN (PL, "Unified Data Platform") AND project = Platform AND issuetype = Bug AND "Found In[Dropdown]" in (PROD, PROD-0, ONPREM, SMP) AND status not in (Invalid, "Can Not Reproduce", "Not a Bug", "Will Not Fix", Duplicate) AND "Customer(s)" is not EMPTY AND "Customer(s)" not in ("Harness/ Internal", Harness) and resolution = Unresolved and (priority in (p0, p1) or "Severity[Dropdown]" in (S0, S1) or (priority = p2 and created < -6w) or ("Severity[Dropdown]" = S2 and created < -6w) or ("Severity[Dropdown]" = S3 and created < -90d) or ("Severity[Dropdown]" = S4 and created < -180d))

name: Platform-PROD-All-Trend
jql:
project in (Pl, UDP) 
and issuetype = Bug AND "Found In[Dropdown]" in (PROD, PROD-0, ONPREM, SMP) AND status not in (Invalid, "Can Not Reproduce", "Not a Bug", "Will Not Fix", Duplicate) and created >= -180d
ORDER BY status ASC

name: Platform-PROD-Created-Last2Wks
jql:
project in (Pl, UDP) 
and issuetype = Bug AND "Found In[Dropdown]" in (PROD, PROD-0, ONPREM, SMP) AND status not in (Invalid, "Can Not Reproduce", "Not a Bug", "Will Not Fix", Duplicate) and resolution = Unresolved AND created >= -2w

name: Platform-PROD-S0S1-OPEN
jql:
IssueType in (Bug)
and project in (Pl, UDP) 
and "Found In[Dropdown]" in (PROD, PROD-0) and resolution = Unresolved AND "Severity[Dropdown]" in (S0,S1)
ORDER BY status ASC

name: Platform-Prod_MissingSeverity
jql:
project in (Pl, UDP) 
and issuetype = Bug AND "Found In[Dropdown]" in (PROD, PROD-0, ONPREM, SMP) AND status not in (Invalid, "Can Not Reproduce", "Not a Bug", "Will Not Fix", Duplicate) and resolution = Unresolved and "Severity[Dropdown]" in (S0,S1,S2)

name: Platform_All_Open_Initiative
jql:
project in (Platform)
and IssueType = Initiative 
and resolution = Unresolved
